AI buyers are moving past pilot theater

Associated Press reports that enterprise AI teams are pushing vendors to prove they can run production systems, not just flashy pilot programs.

Procurement groups increasingly want evidence that rollback controls, evaluation logs, and human escalation paths exist before large contracts are signed.

Read more

More stories

That shift is forcing suppliers to show how their model operations fit incident response, policy review, and internal audit processes.

The Associated Press is an independent global news organization dedicated to factual reporting.
